summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of reipila real estate intelligence platform. Backend: 18/18 API tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 7 pages tested, navigation working, intelligence drawer/sheet working, map interactions working. Real data confirmed: 185 parcelles, 754 signals (Lyon 6e/7e). Claude 4.5 AI integration working.

design_issues.issue: Font loading warnings for Open Sans Bold glyphs (404 errors)
design_issues.impact: Non-critical - fonts render locally as fallback, no visual impact
design_issues.details: MapLibre is trying to load glyphs from https://demotiles.maplibre.org/font/Open Sans Bold/0-255.pbf which returns 404. The map still renders correctly with local font fallback.

design_issues.issue: Search results dropdown overlay intercepts pointer events from header
design_issues.impact: Minor UX issue - search results appear but clicking on them is blocked
design_issues.details: When search results dropdown is open, the header element intercepts pointer events, preventing clicks on search result items. This is a z-index/pointer-events CSS issue.
